new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift kick-off meeting
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra has initiated a non-clinical pay uplift kick-off meeting ahead of the main holiday season. Kevin needs to review the email, understand the UCEA communication timeline, and determine his involvement or team's involvement in the pay uplift project.

new_tasks.title: Reschedule DTP1092 College staff meeting with Crispin
new_tasks.description: Crispin Muncaster has requested to move the DTP1092 College staff meeting to an earlier slot. Kevin needs to coordinate with Crispin and other participants to find a suitable time before Monday.
